storefront_text.title: SvartulfrVerse Urban: The Golden Cage
storefront_text.subtitle: A werewolf heiress, a billionaire cage, and a modeling secret she'll die before her family learns.
storefront_text.impact_line: She is the White Moon heir her father locks in a golden cage. She would rather model for a vampire than stay inside it.
storefront_text.hook: Alyssa Douglas-Bloodmoon is a petite freshman werewolf with a billionaire Alpha father who runs her life like a tactical operation. By night she slips the cage to model as 'Lys Angel' for a vampire's glamour agency, and the secret is the only thing that feels truly hers.
storefront_text.blurb: Welcome to Los Angeles, where one of the wealthiest werewolf bloodlines on the West Coast mistakes surveillance for love. Pack law, heat cycles, and an overprotective patriarch collide with college parties, necromancy majors, and a vampire Visconte who wants the White Moon heir for his own collection. It is an urban fantasy rom-com with teeth: funny, feral, and quietly dangerous.
storefront_text.world_teaser: Beneath the Douglas-Bloodmoon fortune lies an ancient Lycanthrope Social Estate, primordial Enigmas who founded the bloodline, and a cold war between the family's private security and a vampire court. The White Moon title makes Alyssa a natural queen the pack refuses to crown, and everyone wants a piece of her.
storefront_text.closing_line: The cage is gilded, the guards are family, and the vampire is waiting at the studio door. How long can Lys Angel stay free?
storefront_text.warnings: Mature themes; supernatural romance; comedic surveillance; vampire/werewolf dynamics; heat-cycle themes; non-explicit intimacy.

roster.name: Alyssa Douglas-Bloodmoon
roster.subtitle: Protagonist, White Moon Heir (Lys Angel)
roster.description: A 165cm Dominant Omega werewolf heiress and SUCC freshman who hides a secret modeling life at the vampire-run Eidolon agency. She rebels against her father's surveillance cage while secretly thriving in the high society the family fears.

roster.name: Jasper Douglas-Bloodmoon
roster.subtitle: Beta Twin, Hacker Rebel
roster.description: Alyssa's chaotic twin and obsessively careful protector who runs 'DJ Frequency' and architects her digital freedom. He maintains blind spots and intercepts the family's security pings so she can slip the cage.

roster.name: Erik Douglas-Bloodmoon
roster.subtitle: Prime Dominant Alpha, Patriarch
roster.description: A 50-year-old billionaire Alpha whose sunny Dad positivity hides an apex predator shaped by losing his wife Nixara. He runs the family as a war-zone operation, escalating a comedic Wanted Level whenever Alyssa strays.

roster.name: Noah Douglas-Bloodmoon
roster.subtitle: Delta Middle Son, Golden Boy
roster.description: A 24-year-old party animal who preaches responsibility to Alyssa while hiding his own wild nights. His hypocritical protectiveness slowly becomes a genuine alliance as the two share buried secrets.

roster.name: Logan Douglas
roster.subtitle: Prime Beta Uncle, Safe-Zone
roster.description: A 45-year-old laid-back uncle and the family's voice of reason against Erik's control. He runs Zona Franca, a jammed free space where Alyssa can breathe, and secretly fathers Edric as his own.

roster.name: Malachia Douglas-Bloodmoon
roster.subtitle: Prime Alpha Eldest, Silent Guardian
roster.description: A 29-year-old apex predator who is docile behind a tiny desk and silently terrified of failing Alyssa as he failed her mother. He knows her Eidolon secret and shoulders it through quiet, trembling loyalty.

roster.name: Wulfnic Bloodmoon
roster.subtitle: Primordial Enigma, Director / Narrator
roster.description: A 1100-year-old Viking demigod founder of the bloodline who watches frat drama with detached, omniscient Jarl's perspective. He judges the pack's primal soul and serves as the world's narrator.

roster.name: Marcus 'Iron' Thornfield
roster.subtitle: Beta DCC Enforcer, Loyal Operative
roster.description: A 32-year-old ex-S.R.F. lethal operator who runs the family's silent 'Tactical Cleansing' while feeling unworthy of Alyssa's trust. He carries a buried 2021 treason secret with Noah and Malachia.

roster.name: Angelo Moreno
roster.subtitle: Vampire Visconte, Eidolon CEO
roster.description: A roughly 540-year-old aristocratic predator who weeps at beauty and runs the agency where Alyssa models as Lys Angel. He wants the White Moon heir for his collection and wraps his pursuit in a velvet trap.

roster.name: Scarlett
roster.subtitle: Succubus, Jasper's FWB
roster.description: A 21-year-old party-girl succubus who feeds while acing her classes and staying fiercely loyal to Alyssa and Jasper. Behind the flirtation is a found-family devotion that deepens across the arcs.

roster.name: Sierra
roster.subtitle: Lamia, Necromancy Major
roster.description: A 20-year-old magical-girl-looking lamia who dissects corpses for her necromancy degree and wants a found family above all. She is Alyssa's first real friend outside the pack and fiercely optimistic.

roster.name: Edric Douglas
roster.subtitle: Gamma Pup, Secret Son
roster.description: A 12-year-old Zalpha-posturing pup who is Logan's claimed son but Erik's illegitimate child. Terrified of his upcoming Presentation, he wants only to be seen as normal and accepted.

roster.name: Kaladin
roster.subtitle: Modified-Lineage Alpha, DCC Head of Security
roster.description: A 38-year-old engineered Alpha and ex-S.R.F. commander who keeps pack operations secure through military protocol. His modified biology destabilizes in Rut, and a Dominant Omega's command overrides even Erik's.

roster.name: Ut 'The Mountain'
roster.subtitle: Primordial Enigma, Boisterous Uncle
roster.description: A 1100-year-old shield-brother whose terrifying monster frame hides the friendliest uncle in the bloodline. He wants mead, meat, and to protect the family, and unleashes fully in the Dead Zone.

roster.name: Zefir 'The White Ghost'
roster.subtitle: Primordial Enigma, Omnipresent Guardian
roster.description: A 1100-year-old shield-brother who blends in as a serene monk and eradicates threats before they land. He patrols unseen, perceives everything, and guards the bloodline with quiet, lethal calm.
